name: @mulmoclaude/whisper
description: Local voice-input core (whisper.cpp sidecar) shared by MulmoClaude and MulmoTerminal. Server entry manages the whisper-server sidecar, GGML model download, and ffmpeg→WAV transcription (host injects the models dir + logger). The ./client entry is a framework-neutral browser capture controller (MediaRecorder + VAD pause-segmentation). The whisper-server binary + ffmpeg are provided by the host.
